# mixpanel_event_definition (Resource)

Manages a Mixpanel event definition (Lexicon event entry).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mixpanel_event_definition" "purchase" {
  project_id = 1234567

  definitions = [
    {
      name        = "Purchase"
      description = "Fires when a customer completes a checkout"
      verified    = true
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `definitions` (Attributes List) (see [below](#nestedatt--definitions))

### Optional

- `event_definition_id` (Number)
- `project_id` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `collect_everything_event_id` (Number)
- `contacts` (List of String)
- `created_utc` (String)
- `custom_event_id` (Number)
- `description` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `dropped` (Boolean)
- `hidden` (Boolean)
- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `last_modified` (String)
- `merged` (Boolean)
- `merged_event_id` (Number)
- `modified_utc` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `platforms` (List of String)
- `status` (String)
- `tags` (List of String)
- `team_contacts` (List of String)
- `verified` (Boolean)
